comment.body:
did any notice consumer expectations .... at a 12 year low, well below levels associated with a recession  Present Situation Index: Dropped 3.6 points to 134.5, indicating consumers’ assessment of current business and labor market conditions weakened.
Expectations Index: Fell 9.6 points to 65.2, marking its lowest level in 12 years and dipping well below the threshold of 80, which typically signals a potential recession ahead.
